title: 7 Best Constant Contact Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare the best Constant Contact alternatives. Find free and paid email marketing tools for small businesses, creators, and nonprofits.
h1: Best Constant Contact Alternatives for Email Marketing
intro: While Constant Contact offers solid email marketing features, many users seek alternatives that provide better value, more advanced automation, or specialized tools for their specific needs. Whether you're looking for a free option, superior customer support, or industry-specific features, there are several compelling alternatives worth considering.
why_switch: Lower starting prices or free tiers with higher subscriber limits
Better ratings on customer review platforms like Trustpilot and G2
More specialized features for e-commerce, creators, or newsletters
More intuitive automation and segmentation capabilities

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite starts at just $9/month with a generous free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers at no cost. It offers an excellent balance of affordability, ease of use, and essential features like drag-drop editing, automation, and landing pages.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp's free tier allows up to 500 contacts with no time limit, making it perfect for testing before committing financially. Its intuitive interface and automation features make it ideal for businesses just starting their email marketing journey.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is specifically designed for content creators with features like subscriber tagging, visual automations, and integrated commerce capabilities. Its free tier supports up to 1,000 subscribers, perfect for growing creators before monetization.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv excels at newsletter monetization with built-in ad networks and referral programs, plus it has the highest Trustpilot rating (4.4) of all alternatives. It supports 2,500 free subscribers and offers superior analytics for newsletter growth.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines robust email marketing with integrated CRM, advanced automation, and lead scoring—perfect for businesses outgrowing basic email tools. Its comprehensive platform eliminates the need for multiple tools at a similar price point.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo uniquely offers 100,000 free email sends per month (not just subscribers), making it excellent for transactional emails and high-volume marketing. It also includes SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat in one platform.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse stands out with built-in webinar hosting and online course creation tools, making it ideal for educators and digital product creators. Its all-in-one approach eliminates the need for separate webinar and course platforms.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: MailerLite and Mailchimp both offer excellent free tiers. MailerLite provides better value with 1,000 free subscribers compared to Mailchimp's 500, plus lower paid pricing starting at $9/month. For newsletter publishers, Beehiiv offers 2,500 free subscribers with monetization features.

faq.q: What is the best Constant Contact alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the top choice for budget-conscious small businesses, combining affordability (starting at $9/month), ease of use, and essential marketing features. For those needing CRM and advanced automation, ActiveCampaign offers more power at a comparable price point.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite at $9/month is $3 cheaper than Constant Contact's $12/month starting price. Brevo also offers exceptional value with unlimited free sends, while Mailchimp provides completely free service for up to 500 subscribers.
